/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/approval_tests.dir/approval_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approval_tests.dir/docs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approval_tests.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approval_tests.dir/mfl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approval_tests.dir/renderer/svg_renderer.cpp.o -o approval_tests   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/freetype/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/14.1.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/fontconfig/2.17.1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/freetype/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/14.1.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/fontconfig/2.17.1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/expat/lib ../fonts_for_tests/libfonts_for_tests.a ../../src/libmfl.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libcairo.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libpixman-1.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib -lfontconfig -lharfbuzz /opt/homebrew/opt/expat/lib/libexpat.1.dylib -lm
